issues.title: Add support for Amazon Bedrock Claude 3.5 Sonnet
issues.body: Amazon Bedrock just released Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet model:  https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2024/06/anthropic-claude-3-5-sonnet-model-bedrock/

issues.title: Add ChatClient Logging Advisor
issues.body: Add an advisor to log the input and output data for chat client request and response.
